commands.review_summary:
The PR makes foreground reply fencing visibility-aware and propagates visible/non-visible delivery outcomes through durable delivery, the SDK compatibility path, and WhatsApp reply delivery.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: start two same-target foreground buffered dispatches, make the newer dispatch produce no visible delivery, and current main cancels the older final on generation change alone. I did not execute the repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer should review the shared message-delivery semantic change and decide whether the supplied dispatcher proof is enough or whether to request live WhatsApp transport proof.

target.title: Fix foreground reply fence visibility
target.body:
## Summary

- Make the foreground reply fence wait for newer same-target dispatches to either produce a visible delivery or finish without one before deciding whether an older pending final should send.
- Propagate explicit visible/non-visible delivery outcomes through durable channel delivery, SDK compatibility dispatch, WhatsApp delivery paths, and post-delivery observer failures.
- Route deferred WhatsApp media flushes through the settled delivery hook so foreground fences see the final visible delivery state even when dispatch completion and flush timing diverge.

## Motivation

A WhatsApp foreground-dispatch repro showed an older final being cancelled when a newer same-target inbound produced no visible reply. The same behavior reproduces in the shared foreground dispatcher independent of channel name.

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Gateway / orchestration
- [x] Integrations
- [x] Plugin SDK compatibility path

## Linked Issue/PR

Related: #85361 covers Telegram DM delivery; this PR fixes shared foreground fencing and WhatsApp visibility metadata.

## Root Cause

The foreground fence previously treated any newer same-target generation as superseding, even when that newer dispatch produced no visible delivery. Some durable, WhatsApp, and channel-turn paths also returned or threw without enough visibility metadata for the core fence to distinguish no visible reply from a reply that was already visible.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: A newer same-target WhatsApp foreground dispatch that produces no visible reply should not cancel an older active dispatch's final reply; deferred WhatsApp media sends and post-delivery observer failures must still count as visible delivery for freshness.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on PR head fcb0be75826c9482474d8f1e34cd55e7c41fff58 plus Blacksmith Testbox changed gate tbx_01ksbyd2g0s9mbqvh6db1h4d4b.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/dispatch.freshness.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor/inbound-dispatch.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/inbound-reply-dispatch.test.ts src/channels/turn/durable-delivery.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/deliver-reply.test.ts src/channels/turn/kernel.test.ts; node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo; node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo; node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src ui packages; .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main; node scripts/check-changed.mjs.

Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed 6 files / 121 tests. Core and extension test typechecks passed. Core oxlint passed with 0 errors. Autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings. Blacksmith Testbox check:changed passed in run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26350139642.

Observed result after fix: Older foreground finals now wait behind a newer active same-target dispatch and cancel only when the newer dispatch has visible delivery. They proceed when the newer dispatch completes without visible output, and visible deferred media or post-send observer failures are marked so stale older replies do not leak afterward.

What was not tested: Live WhatsApp transport send with the patched gateway.

## Regression Test Plan

- Core foreground fence regression coverage in src/auto-reply/dispatch.freshness.test.ts.
- Durable delivery and generic channel-turn coverage in src/channels/turn/durable-delivery.test.ts and src/channels/turn/kernel.test.ts.
- SDK compatibility no-send coverage in src/plugin-sdk/inbound-reply-dispatch.test.ts.
- WhatsApp durable/no-send/deferred-media/partial-failure coverage in extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor/inbound-dispatch.test.ts and extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/deliver-reply.test.ts.

## Risk

Older finals can now wait behind a newer active same-target dispatch until it completes. That wait is intentional for freshness and bounded by dispatcher completion/finally cleanup. The main behavior change is that no-send newer turns stop suppressing older visible finals.
target.author: cavit99
